name: /feature reads the failing tests written by the spec-writer from the active suite for the named feature
command: mkdir -p evals/specs profiles && printf '{"name":"red test","command":"false","setup":[],"expect":{"exit_code":0,"stderr_contains":["ok"]},"feature_id":"feat-x"}\n' > evals/specs/feat-x.json && printf 'rules: {}\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/feature.sh" --feature-id feat-x --profile profiles/p.yaml --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'red_tests_found=1' out.txt && grep -q 'feature_id=feat-x' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
